Output:
// ../entrypoints/data-index.ts
import policyData from "./0fbcb3a47a6103fbcc4250cb4441e33f2b6f36d4-token-policy.rules.json";
var data_index_default = {
  fetch() {
    const text = new TextDecoder().decode(policyData);
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      byteLength: policyData.byteLength,
      constructor: policyData.constructor.name,
      parsed: JSON.parse(text),
      text,
      type: typeof policyData
    }));
  }
};
export {
  data_index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=data-index.js.map

[235] assistant: The `Data` dry-run shape is the same external-module upload, but the code expects an `ArrayBuffer`. I’m running it locally once to verify that expectation rather than relying on naming.
